about.name: Sriram Boddeda
about.title: Full Stack Developer
about.subtitle: Welcome to My Portfolio
about.description: I build web applications with a focus on front-end development and design.
about.bio: Backend and distributed systems engineer with experience designing scalable microservices platforms, building real-time data processing pipelines, and developing full-stack web applications. Skilled in performance optimization, asynchronous workflows, and enterprise data migration. Passionate about architecting reliable, high-throughput systems that solve complex problems at scale.

projects.title: DApp Marketplace on Ethereum Testnet
projects.description: Created a decentralized marketplace focused on secure peer-to-peer trading, featuring custom smart contracts deployed on the Ethereum Testnet for on-chain security. The project involved streamlining the user journey through the integration of instant wallet authentication and Ether payments, ultimately providing a faster and more accessible onboarding experience.

projects.title: Facial Expression Recognition
projects.description: Developed a CNN model for classifying facial expressions with a 62% accuracy using TensorFlow and Kaggle datasets. Created a Python GUI for real-time classification and integrated OpenCV for enhanced image processing.

projects.title: Noteworthy
projects.description: Developed Noteworthy, a feature-rich, AI-powered note-taking application built with Next.js and designed for productivity and organization. This application provides a seamless and intuitive experience for creating, managing, and organizing your thoughts and ideas.

projects.title: Job Shop Application
projects.description: Developed a database-driven application for managing and booking services like paint jobs. Included a relational database with MS SQL stored procedures and a JSP-based web application for user interactions.

achievements: Architected AtlasCollect, a microservices-based data platform scaling to 1.8k req/sec by decoupling core processing, file services, and schedulers to maximize system fault tolerance.
Developed a resource-aware job scheduler in Node.js that pre-calculates memory overhead relative to dataset dimensions, eliminating 100% of system crashes during high-load data ingestion.
Optimized computational throughput by designing an asynchronous parallel worker system using Node.js child processes, reducing compute-heavy workflow runtimes by 60%.
Built a standalone CLI/TUI Migration Tool with integrated file deduplication and secure export/import services, improving storage efficiency by 30% across distributed environments.
Implemented real-time task tracking via Server-Sent Events (SSE), providing sub-second progress updates and enhancing system transparency for 500+ active researchers.
Achieved a 45% reduction in API latency by implementing a Redis caching layer and optimizing PostgreSQL indexing for high-concurrency metadata lookups.
Engineered the lab’s core web platform using Next.js and Strapi, implementing Redis caching for performance and reducing manual content updates by 50% through headless CMS automation.
Designed reusable conference platforms with year-based routing and automatic archives, cutting setup time for recurring events by 60% while ensuring seamless content migration.
Automated large-scale outreach and database synchronization using Selenium and Python, reducing manual coordination effort by 70% across multiple workshop cycles.
Developed backend services for an enterprise Status Board; delivered GraphQL/REST APIs and LDAP authentication, reducing manual infrastructure checks by 70%.
Architected enterprise ECM migration pipelines using ETL/ELT logic, ensuring 100% data consistency for millions of records through memory-optimized version synchronization.
Developed PowerShell scripts to validate migration integrity via automated audits, reducing QA effort by 60% and saving 30+ engineering hours per testing cycle.
Developed a .NET Core test-data generator using RabbitMQ to interface with legacy ECM libraries, enabling automated data creation and migration testing through a decoupled messaging layer.
Implemented incremental migration logic via file version synchronization to detect and migrate updated files, significantly reducing bandwidth overhead across environments.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
